title: 國一第四單元：呼吸作用與能量的獲得

runtime.nonRepeatPolicy: app.js stores recent quiz signatures in localStorage and re-rolls seed when a duplicate signature appears.
runtime.taxonomySource: No fine-grained taxonomy yet; falls back to unit-level generators.

units.title: 呼吸作用與能量的獲得

basic.purpose: Drills confirm definitions, mechanisms, and standard reasoning steps; all questions are multiple choice.
guardrails: Scenarios and numbers are generated by questions.js; answers are computed from the same parameters.
No constructed-response items: the official 自然 exam is multiple choice only.
